subject: Agave
object: $15M Series A to Bring AI to Construction Financials
source_quote: Agave Secures $15M Series A to Bring AI to Construction Financials

subject: Agave
object: $15M Series A to Bring AI to Construction Financials
source_quote: Agave, the AI platform for construction financials, has raised a $15 million Series A led by Accel, with continued participation from Y Combinator, bringing total funding to over $20 million since its 2021 founding by Tom Reno, John Zucchi, and Pooria Azimi.

subject: Agave
object: $15M Series A to Bring AI to Construction Financials
source_quote: PRESS RELEASE — Agave, the AI platform for construction financials, has announced it raised a $15M Series A funding round from Accel, who led Agave’s Seed round, with continued participation from YCombinator. The round brings Agave’s total funding to over $20 million since its origin in late 2021. Founded by Tom Reno, John Zucchi, and Pooria Azimi, Agave will use the new capital to expand its team and scale its growing suite of products, which already help hundreds of contractors boost their team’s productivity by automating accounting and back-office work.

subject: Agave
object: $15M Series A to Bring AI to Construction Financials
source_quote: Agave connects with more than 14 ERP and project management systems to automate invoice coding, reconciliation, vendor compliance checks, and custom AI agent workflows, addressing a looming labor shift as 41% of the construction workforce is expected to retire within five years.

object: $30M to scale the AI operating & decisioning system for financial services
source_quote: Feathery, the AI operating and decisioning system for financial services, announced today that it has raised $30M in total funding , including its recently completed Series A, from Portage Ventures , Index Ventures, Allstate Strategic Ventures, Clocktower Ventures, Erie Strategic Ventures, and Bain Capital Ventures. The company is one of the fastest-growing AI platforms for financial services, serving more than 300 firms across insurance and wealth management.

subject: InstaLILY
object: $60 million to put AI agents inside construction and logistics firms - Startup Fortune
source_quote: InstaLILY closed a $60 million Series B led by Energize Capital, with Home Depot Ventures and United Rentals joining as strategic investors after seeing its AI agents inside their own operations. The round, which pushes total funding toward $100 million, comes with a launch of Lily, an AI 'Forward Deployed Engineer,' and a reported $200 million revenue result at one industrial distributor.

subject: InstaLILY
object: $60 million to put AI agents inside construction and logistics firms - Startup Fortune
source_quote: InstaLILY has raised $60 million because industrial companies are buying a very specific promise: AI agents that can find revenue and fix operations inside businesses built on parts, rentals and delivery routes.

subject: InstaLILY
object: $60 million to put AI agents inside construction and logistics firms - Startup Fortune
source_quote: A national industrial distributor added more than $200 million in new annual sales after handing sales prospecting to software built by InstaLILY. That's the number selling the pitch. No demo could do it better. It explains why Energize Capital led a $60 million Series B into the company behind it.

subject: Workflow automation startup Parabola
source_quote: Workflow automation startup Parabola raises $24M

subject: Workflow automation startup Parabola
source_quote: Parabola , a San Francisco-based startup that uses AI to help expedite back-office processes, particularly in the logistics and e-commerce sectors, today announced that it raised $24 million in a Series B funding round led by OpenView, with participation from strategic investor Flexport alongside Matrix, Thrive, Good Friends, Webflow, Otherwise Fund, Abstract Ventures and Merus Capital.

subject: Workflow automation startup Parabola
source_quote: Alex Yaseen, Parabola’s founder and CEO, says the new capital will be put toward hiring and product R&D. To date, the company’s raised $34.2 million — inclusive of the latest tranche.

subject: Workflow automation startup Parabola
source_quote: Boiled down to basics, the platform applies AI to automate various workflows. Using Parabola, customers can take documents like PDFs, text message logs, images and emails and have Parabola standardize, enrich or categorize them.

subject: 开发者用 Claude Fable 5 轨迹微调 OpenBMB 的 MiniCPM5-1B，
object: The model is built on openbmb/MiniCPM5-1B . That base is a real, documented release from OpenBMB . It is a dense 1.08B-parameter model using a standard LlamaForCausalLM architecture. It has 24 layers, grouped-query attention, and a 131,072-token context length. OpenBMB reports 1B-class open-source SOTA within its own comparison set.
source_quote: The model is built on openbmb/MiniCPM5-1B . That base is a real, documented release from OpenBMB . It is a dense 1.08B-parameter model using a standard LlamaForCausalLM architecture. It has 24 layers, grouped-query attention, and a 131,072-token context length. OpenBMB reports 1B-class open-source SOTA within its own comparison set.

subject: 开发者用 Claude Fable 5 轨迹微调 OpenBMB 的 MiniCPM5-1B，
object: The base already ships a native thinking template. Reasoning is toggled through enable_thinking , giving both a Think and a No Think mode. The derivative model keeps that template and MiniCPM5’s tool-call format.
source_quote: The base already ships a native thinking template. Reasoning is toggled through enable_thinking , giving both a Think and a No Think mode. The derivative model keeps that template and MiniCPM5’s tool-call format.

subject: 开发者用 Claude Fable 5 轨迹微调 OpenBMB 的 MiniCPM5-1B，
object: On top of that base, the developer applied a fine-tune. The card states the model is ‘further fine-tuned on Fable 5 data’ to improve coding and instruction following. The GGUF card repeats this as ‘post-trained on Fable 5 data.’
source_quote: On top of that base, the developer applied a fine-tune. The card states the model is ‘further fine-tuned on Fable 5 data’ to improve coding and instruction following. The GGUF card repeats this as ‘post-trained on Fable 5 data.’

subject: 开发者用 Claude Fable 5 轨迹微调 OpenBMB 的 MiniCPM5-1B，
object: A community developer, GnLOLot , has published a 1B model that runs fully on local hardware. The model is MiniCPM5-1B-Claude-Opus-Fable5-Thinking , with GGUF builds for llama.cpp-compatible runtimes. It needs no API key and makes no cloud calls.
source_quote: A community developer, GnLOLot , has published a 1B model that runs fully on local hardware. The model is MiniCPM5-1B-Claude-Opus-Fable5-Thinking , with GGUF builds for llama.cpp-compatible runtimes. It needs no API key and makes no cloud calls.

subject: Feyn AI

source_quote: The Feyn team has released SQRL , a family of models that turn natural language questions into SQL.

subject: Feyn AI
object: SQRL-4B, SQRL-9B, and SQRL-35B-A3B checkpoints on Hugging Face
source_quote: Three checkpoints ship openly on Hugging Face : SQRL-4B , SQRL-9B , and SQRL-35B-A3B .

subject: Perplexity
object: WANDR，评估智能体的广泛搜索与深度验证能力
source_quote: Perplexity released WANDR (Wide ANd Deep Research) . It is an open benchmark and evaluation harness. It is built around 500 realistic, challenging data-collection tasks for knowledge work. WANDR is the wide sibling of Perplexity’s DRACO benchmark for deep research. DRACO asks whether an agent produces an accurate, complete, objective long-form report. WANDR instead asks whether it can build a large collection with evidence.

subject: Perplexity
object: WANDR，评估智能体的广泛搜索与深度验证能力
source_quote: At its core, WANDR tests two demands together. Wide means discovering a large, often open-ended set of qualifying entities. Deep means investigating every entity enough to support each claim with evidence. Combining both changes the problem for agents. A few compelling examples are not enough here. A polished narrative built on incomplete research also falls short.

subject: Perplexity
object: WANDR，评估智能体的广泛搜索与深度验证能力
source_quote: To capture this, WANDR uses a composable qualification key hierarchy . One task might request company(n) -> employee(m) -> url(k) . This means n qualifying companies, m employees each, and k supporting pages each. Every complete path through the tree gets validated independently. The same structure can represent a flat list, nested search, or matrix.

subject: Can an Apple
object: derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
source_quote: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?

subject: Can an Apple
object: derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
source_quote: Apple recently filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI , accusing the AI company of a pattern of misconduct aimed at getting current and former Apple employees to share confidential information. (In response, OpenAI said it is “not aware of any evidence that this complaint has merit.”)

subject: Can an Apple
object: derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
source_quote: On the latest episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast , Kirsten Korosec, Sean O’Kane, and I debated whether this lawsuit will cast a shadow over OpenAI’s much-discussed plans to get into the hardware business (starting with a mobile smart speaker ) and go public .

subject: Can an Apple
object: derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
source_quote: With all those plans on the line, will OpenAI try to settle this as quickly as possible, or did it learn from its recent courtroom victory against Elon Musk that it can endure the cost and embarrassment of a trial?

subject: Lyft and Drive.ai partner on Bay Area self-driving ride-hailing
object: Lyft is teaming up with autonomous driving startup Drive.ai to deploy self-driving cars in and around San Francisco with a new pilot project.
source_quote: Lyft is teaming up with autonomous driving startup Drive.ai to deploy self-driving cars in and around San Francisco with a new pilot project.

subject: Lyft and Drive.ai partner on Bay Area self-driving ride-hailing
object: Drive.ai is going to be operating some of its test fleet on Lyft’s open platform , which Lyft created to help carmakers and self-driving tech companies build and deploy autonomous vehicles in the real world, and to eventually serve as on-demand ride hailing vehicles.
source_quote: Drive.ai is going to be operating some of its test fleet on Lyft’s open platform , which Lyft created to help carmakers and self-driving tech companies build and deploy autonomous vehicles in the real world, and to eventually serve as on-demand ride hailing vehicles.

subject: Lyft and Drive.ai partner on Bay Area self-driving ride-hailing
object: The pilot will start off relatively small in scale and progress over time, according to Drive.ai President and Co-Founder Carol Reiley and Lyft Director of Product for Self-Driving Taggart Matthiesen.
source_quote: The pilot will start off relatively small in scale and progress over time, according to Drive.ai President and Co-Founder Carol Reiley and Lyft Director of Product for Self-Driving Taggart Matthiesen.

subject: 面壁智能

subject: 世界人工智能
object: 组织在上海成立，29国签署协定鼓励共建开源生态
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 19 日消息，据央视新闻今日报道，《关于成立世界人工智能合作组织的协定》签署仪式 16 日在上海举行，来自亚洲、非洲、拉美和欧洲的 29 个国家现场签署协定，成为创始成员国。

subject: 阿里云百炼
object: HappyOyster 1.0，一句话生成可互动 AI 数字世界
source_quote: IT之家 7 月 19 日消息，今日，阿里云百炼正式上线可实时构建和交互的开放式世界模型产品 HappyOyster 1.0 （快乐生蚝 1.0），更多消息现已公布。

subject: 阿里云百炼
object: HappyOyster 1.0，一句话生成可互动 AI 数字世界
source_quote: 据官方介绍，该模型深度学习物理世界状态转移规律，能主动推演从动作到反馈的因果链，并保持人物和环境的长程一致性。

subject: 阿里云百炼
object: HappyOyster 1.0，一句话生成可互动 AI 数字世界
source_quote: HappyOyster 1.0 具备世界探索（Adventure）和实时导演（Directing）两大模式， 用户输入一句话或一张图即可生成可互动、可探索的 AI 数字世界 。

subject: 阿里云百炼
object: HappyOyster 1.0，一句话生成可互动 AI 数字世界
source_quote: 文生视频模型的学习目标是文本到视频的单向映射，而 HappyOyster 1.0 的学习目标是从“当前状态 / 动作”到“下一状态 / 动作”的转移规律， 因此支持用户在任意节点介入并改变数字世界走向 。

source_quote: View the LinkedIn Profile of Matthias Bastian

subject: Alibaba's Qwen takes on
object: is "second only to Fable 5"
source_quote: Alibaba has unveiled Qwen 3.8, its latest open-weight model with 2.4 trillion parameters. The Qwen team says it matches frontier models and trails only Fable 5. A preview is available through Alibaba's Token Plan , Qoder, and QoderWork at 10 percent of the standard price. Open weights are coming "soon."

subject: Alibaba's Qwen takes on
object: is "second only to Fable 5"
source_quote: Alibaba says Qwen 3.8 should outperform Qwen 3.7-Max, especially in coding and complex productivity tasks such as full-stack development, data analysis, and office workflows. Developer Shuai Bai says it's also the team's first multimodal model with more than 1 trillion parameters and can process images, videos, and documents. No benchmark results are available yet.

subject: 蔡磊团队
object: 渐冻症治愈的可能路径
source_quote: 他和团队搭建渐冻症“AI 科研大脑”，大幅度提升研发效率，并在动物模型验证了渐冻症治愈的可能路径。

subject: 蔡磊团队
object: 临床前动物模型上治愈渐冻症的可能路径
source_quote: 蔡磊团队还借助人工智能，首次发现并通过临床前实验合作重复验证，确认存在临床前动物模型上治愈渐冻症的可能路径，包括通过骨髓移植彻底免疫重建等办法。

source_quote: 他说，M153 推出时的目标并不是展示技术，而是把智能体能力交给真实用户，在真实生活场景中验证体验。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 努比亚总裁倪飞：未来不是人操作手机，而是手机替人办事，NaviX Ultra 智能体手机即将量产
source_quote: 经过过去数月的测试，团队重点围绕四类用户反馈持续迭代，包括“能不能真正听懂自然语言”“能不能一句话完成整件事情”“能不能记住用户习惯”“隐私安全是否足够可靠”。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 努比亚总裁倪飞：未来不是人操作手机，而是手机替人办事，NaviX Ultra 智能体手机即将量产
source_quote: 在倪飞看来， “全球首款”的意义，并不在于率先提出概念，而是率先把概念做成用户每天都可以使用的产品。

object: 千里科技在 WAIC 公布多项进展：阶跃 Step AOS 将应用于汽车，年底推 ASD 5.0
source_quote: 在操作系统层面，阶跃星辰日前发布智能体原生操作系统 Step AOS， 千里科技同步宣布将其应用于汽车领域 。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 千里科技在 WAIC 公布多项进展：阶跃 Step AOS 将应用于汽车，年底推 ASD 5.0
source_quote: IT之家注意到，本次 WAIC，千里科技联合吉利、阶跃星辰共同研发的汽车“超级智能体”—— 超级 Eva 亮相阶跃展台，该超级智能体以阶跃星辰最新发布的 Agentic 模型 Step 3.7 Flash 为核心执行大脑。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 千里科技在 WAIC 公布多项进展：阶跃 Step AOS 将应用于汽车，年底推 ASD 5.0
source_quote: Step AOS 具备记忆、决策与执行、安全三大核心特征，将模型能力与终端能力深度打通，能将包括汽车在内的硬件与原有系统的全部能力，转化为智能体可直接调用的算力、可理解的数据和可调用的资源，用户只需表达任务意图，全链路由智能体自主完成。

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 千里科技在 WAIC 公布多项进展：阶跃 Step AOS 将应用于汽车，年底推 ASD 5.0
source_quote: 千里科技联合阶跃星辰共同研发的超级智能体，具备类人自然交互、多语种支持能力，可将用户提出的模糊出行需求自动转化为导航路径规划，并打通智驾全程。
